author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: 1) Add all missing sub-crate deps to umbrella Cargo.toml (some as optional features). 2) Add re-export submodules in lib.rs for data, vision, train, serialize, distributed, jit, gpu, hub, profiler, distributions. 3) Expand prelude with new wave 1-5 types. 4) Update umbrella README with full crate list.
